subject: Properties of Expectation
question: Let $X_1$ and $X_2$ be two random variables with joint density function $f_{X_1 X_2}(x_1, x_2) = \begin{cases} 1 & 0 < x_1 < 1, 0 < x_2 < 1 \\ 0 & \text{otherwise} \end{cases}$ Find the moment generating function $M(t_1, t_2)$.
explanation: Answer not listed in the book's key — work it through, then check Finan.
